mapper.select: SELECT h.hotel_id, h.hotel_name, h.approve_status, i.image_url FROM tbl_hotel h LEFT JOIN hotel_image i ON h.hotel_id = i.fk_hotel_id AND i.is_main = 'Y' ORDER BY h.hotel_id

SELECT H.HOTEL_ID, H.HOTEL_NAME, H.ADDRESS, H.CONTACT, H.HOTEL_DESC, H.APPROVE_STATUS, I.IMAGE_URL
FROM TBL_HOTEL H
LEFT JOIN HOTEL_IMAGE I ON H.HOTEL_ID = I.FK_HOTEL_ID AND I.IS_MAIN = 'Y'
WHERE H.HOTEL_ID = #{hotelId}
mapper.insert:
select seq_hotel_id.nextval from dual
insert into tbl_hotel (hotel_id, hotel_name, address, contact, hotel_desc, approve_status, active_yn, created_by) values (#{hotel_id}, #{hotel_name}, #{address}, #{contact}, #{hotel_desc}, #{approve_status}, #{active_yn}, #{created_by})
insert into HOTEL_IMAGE (image_id, fk_hotel_id, image_url, is_main, sort_order) values (SEQ_HOTEL_IMAGE.nextval, #{fk_hotel_id}, #{image_url}, #{is_main}, #{sort_order})
